title: Figure 2.8 Convolution of x(t) and h(t).
summary: This page is a figure-only page illustrating the graphical convolution of two continuous-time signals, x(t) = e^{-t} and h(t) = e^{-2t}. The subfigures show the original signals, time reversal and shifting of h, overlap regions for t < 0 and t ≥ 0, and the resulting output y(t).
